tle":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7106785937178233897","book_info":{"abstract":"斯坦福桥球场，欧冠决赛。
龙国20岁神锋楚潇然，在这片传奇绿茵场上上演帽子戏法！
为蓝军问鼎欧冠，立下汗马功劳，震惊世界！
赛后采访，面对全世界的媒体，他笑着说：
“我最感谢的，就是我的高中老师许老师！”
“没有他，就没有我！”
……
国际田联钻石联赛，桑巴站。
龙国飞人刘云飞，以9秒52的成绩，破了那个尘封已久的世界纪录！
面对全世界媒体的采访，他腼腆地说道：
“没有许老师，就没有我刘云飞的今天！”
……
两年时间，狂揽百亿票房的传奇女神沈曼颖，
在百花奖的颁奖典礼上，笑着说道：
“其实，我是我们班混得最差的那一个！”

,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":35642,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":73190},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7140217827797385987","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者文笔超好，在作者的笔下，男主就是大家梦寐以求的那种老师，在他绑定了最强班主任系统之后，点亮了各种技能，然后还帮助自己班里的学生，带着这些学生走上正确的道路，我在看这本书的时候，我真的眼泪都不自主的流了下来，高二九班的学生不就是我自己的翻版吗？但是高二九班的学生非常的幸运，他们遇到了男主，但是我们没有男主这样的老师。。。。[哭][哭]","text_exts":[{"e":40,"s":37,"text":"班主任","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%8F%AD%E4%B8%BB%E4%BB%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774178540CC4A7ABA%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227140217827797385987%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227106785937178233897%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8F%AD%E4%B8%BB%E4%BB%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1662461629,"group_id":"7106785937178233897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5KoWqy+6C769rVzNQ4KqLMk89uRbod7qDWfwNTKvN5Z","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2586511343105950","user_name":"完全平方公式"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2586511343105950","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7106785937178233897","book_info":{"abstract":"斯坦福桥球场，欧冠决赛。
